title: cenchrus caliculatus
intro: Cenchrus caliculatus, also known as the spiny bur grass or spiny bursage, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical and subtropical regions of the Americas. Traditionally, Cenchrus caliculatus has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its leaves and stems. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Cenchrus caliculatus is often used in teas, infusions, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
